CustomField.description: Automatically updates based on the Policy Expiry Date. If the Policy Expiry Date is in the past, it will mark the certificate as Inactive, indicating that the certificate is no longer active.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Automatically updates based on the Policy Expiry Date. If the Policy Expiry Date is in the past, it will mark the certificate as Inactive, indicating that the certificate is no longer active.
CustomField.label: Inactive
